rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks in component implementation annexes for implementation-level signal routing assignments.
Use assign statements only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scope.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture by inserting annex blocks at appropriate component or implementation levels.
Avoid placing guarantee statements in implementation scope; use type scope for dependency guarantees.
Do not include implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Implementation contracts use assign for binding signals, not guarantees.
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; use type-level annexes for such contracts.
Do not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
AADL structural extraction for component types and features
Boolean data range comparison and opaque data port handling
